task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 07-6-111 Y coarse calibration of the maintenance unit

desc.p: Y coarse calibration of the maintenance unit

section.title: Function
section.p: This test is used to ensure the proper Y-alignment of the printheads relative to tissue wipe unit during the purge wipe procedure.
This test also used to check if the Y-alignment is correct.

section.title: Tool
section.p: To execute this adjustment a special adjustment cassette is supplied with the service maintenance unit.

section.title: Procedure

li.p: When asked open the top cover.
Measure distance X from the side indicated.
Measure width W of the roll
Input Value on the UI in [0.1 mm]

note.p: Be aware that the ink of the printed line is not cured and should be handled accordingly.

After this a second line is printed (depicted as magenta line in below figure) to check if the adjustment is within specification. To prevent confusion the first printed line can be wiped off before the second line is printed or the roller can be rotated 180 degrees first).

section.p: The adjustment succeeded if |(W/2 – X)| < 0.5 mm. If this is not the case repeat SDS test 76111 from the start.
